title: Goat's Elytra Trims
description: My attempt at making trimmable Elytras.
body:
# **Put the Datapack in your Datapack and Resourcepack folders for it to work!**

This Datapack adds Trims for Elytras in a Vanilla way.

GET is for those People who want Elytra Trims without any other Features.
# **A Preview of the Trims**
![All of the Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be12eca4cf924065fe255ed1bef588174eefec9a.png)
# **Modpacks**
Yes, you can use it in a Modpack
